results.title: Bastille Day parade showcases EU's Macron-led support for Ukraine
results.description: Ukrainian soldiers marching down the Champs-Elysees drew some of the loudest cheers Tuesday as France turned its Bastille Day parade into a show of European military support for Kyiv. About 25 Ukrainian troops took part in the procession. Two Ukrainian pilots flew overhead aboard French Mirage 2000B fighter jets, while President ...
